he seemed to grow larger and more frightening, drawing
increasingly fervorous responses from his rapt audience.

it was his leadership that earned Aul, the Last King, his crown.

flavourText: "Accusations fly. Sinner! Heretic! I am but an initiate, and my patron urges
silence. We will keep our heads down while one High Templar supplants
another. It's all about power, my patron whispers, and we have none..."

I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

How it chokes the heart. Withers the soul. Judge me, and you judge yourself."
- Saresh, last words, to Sekhema Orbala
